My Clients

I don't just run campaigns —
I build growth engines.

I'm a performance marketing leader with 8+ years inside some of the world's most recognizable brands — scaling media investment from early traction to $25M+ annually at Omnicom (formerly IPG).

My edge is moving seamlessly between high-level strategy and hands-on execution — from architecting full-funnel frameworks to piloting AI-driven betas, and delivering frameworks to secure multi-million dollar budgets.

Every brand's growth looks different. My approach is always rooted in data, accountability, and one thing: what actually moves the needle.

What I Specialize In

Strategy. Execution. Results.

Whether you're a startup acquiring your first customers or an established brand ready to scale, I bring the tools and experience to get you there — fast.

Paid Media & Performance Marketing

Full-funnel acquisition engineered to drive qualified leads and foot traffic at a sustainable CAC. I apply enterprise-level frameworks to your specific scale, ensuring every dollar spent is optimized for bottom-line revenue.

Google AdsMetaAmazonSnapchatRedditPinterestDV360TikTok
AI-Driven Campaign Strategy

Leveraging advanced PMAX and AI Max playbooks to automate and eliminate wasted ad spend. I help brands outpace competitors by using machine learning to identify high-intent customers in real-time without increasing overhead.

PMAXAI MaxAutomationOptimization
Digital to Physical Growth

Strategic retail media plans designed to grow your presence online and drive customers to physical storefronts. From Amazon dominance to local shopper marketing, I bridge the gap between product discovery and the final sale.

Retail MediaShopper MarketingD2C
Full-Funnel Growth

Strategic CMO-level partnership focused on high-level channel mix, testing roadmaps, and revenue-linked invstments. I provide the Fortune 500 discipline and planning needed to scale your business effectively and predictably.
